title: Guidance for Elderly With Cognitive Disorders
text:
Summary: The purpose of the programme is to facilitate the anticipation of dementia both in elderly patients suffering from this disease and in their carers and to diminish care burden in order to improve quality of life and daily functioning.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 elderly (> 70 years) with mild dementia in presence of a carer.
Exclusion criteria:
